critical_flags: CRITICAL — CAPTAIN ABSENT: Haaland (MCI, FWD) is confirmed UNAVAILABLE in GW38. He is on the bench in squad data with status UNAVAILABLE. Gemini's projected captain xPts of 14 will not materialise. Captaincy cascades to vice captain.

summary: Gemini GW38 picks relayed exactly as cached. Captain: Haaland (projected 14 xPts), Vice: Gabriel. No transfers. No chip. Confidence: high. HOWEVER — both armband picks are confirmed absent per medical-bay intelligence. Haaland is UNAVAILABLE (MCI squad omission), Gabriel had season-ending surgery. Effective captaincy will auto-cascade to Bowen (WHU). Gemini's 85 projected xPts figure is based on a captain who will not play. Director should treat this as a broken Gemini recommendation and weight Claude's captain pick accordingly.
